requirement: Project site in SCE territory; active SCE electric account; pays PPP surcharge on the account with EE installation.
12 consecutive months of energy usage (AMI) data available; baseline modeling criteria apply.
No more than one CPUC ratepayer-funded EE incentive/rebate program can fund the same measure cost (no double-dipping, incl. statewide midstream HVAC/Lighting).
No change in onsite generation capacity within the previous 12 months and no planned change within the next 12 months (solar, TES, batteries).
Customer may not be enrolled in a wholesale Demand Response program under Rule 24.
Customer sites with >1 MW peak demand require additional screening.
Projects must comply with the CPUC NMEC Rulebook for permissible projects.
Installations must be completed by December 31, 2027, or before funding is fully allocated.
